allow: PowerShell($r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/admin -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "no-auth /admin status: $\($r1.StatusCode\) -> $\($r1.Headers.Location\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/admin/login -UseBasicParsing; "login page: $\($r2.StatusCode\), has form: $\($r2.Content -match 'Admin password'\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000/admin -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response; "caught: $\($r.StatusCode.value__\) loc: $\($r.Headers['Location']\)" }; if \($r -is [Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.HtmlWebResponseObject]\) { "status $\($r.StatusCode\); shows login card: $\($r.Content -match 'Admin password'\); shows dashboard: $\($r.Content -match 'Recent transactions'\)" })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o "$env:TEMP\\admin.html" -w "status:%{http_code} redirect:%{redirect_url}`n" http://localhost:3000/admin; Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\admin.html" -Pattern 'Admin password','Recent transactions','Owner Dashboard' -List | ForEach-Object { $_.Pattern })
PowerShell(Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\admin.html" -Pattern 'Enter your admin password','Product catalog','Paystack not connected','private admin view' -List | ForEach-Object { $_.Pattern })
PowerShell($c = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\admin.html" -Raw; "len: $\($c.Length\)"; if \($c -match 'admin/login'\) {"contains admin/login redirect: yes"} else {"contains admin/login: no"})

PowerShell($sha=[System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256]::Create\(\); $token=\([BitConverter]::ToString\($sha.ComputeHash\([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('blaze-admin-2026:blaze-admin-v1'\)\)\) -replace '-',''\).ToLower\(\); curl.exe -s -o "$env:TEMP\\admin-auth.html" -w "status:%{http_code}`n" -H "Cookie: blaze_admin_session=$token" http://localhost:3000/admin; Select-String -Path "$env:TEMP\\admin-auth.html" -Pattern 'private admin view','Product catalog','Paystack not connected','Blaze Forex Mastery' -List | ForEach-Object { $_.Pattern })

PowerShell($c = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\admin-auth.html" -Raw; "len:$\($c.Length\)"; foreach \($p in 'Product catalog','Paystack not connected','Blaze Forex Mastery','Recent transactions','placeholder'\) { "$p : $\($c -match [regex]::Escape\($p\)\)" })

PowerShell(npx tsc src/lib/products.ts --outDir "$env:TEMP\\claude-prod" --module commonjs --target es2020 --skipLibCheck; node -e "const {products}=require\(process.env.TEMP+'/claude-prod/products.js'\); require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('src/lib/products-data.json', JSON.stringify\(products,null,2\)+'\\n'\)"; "done: $\(\(Get-Item src/lib/products-data.json\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($sha=[System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256]::Create\(\); $token=\([BitConverter]::ToString\($sha.ComputeHash\([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\('blaze-admin-2026:blaze-admin-v1'\)\)\) -replace '-',''\).ToLower\(\); $h="Cookie: blaze_admin_session=$token"; curl.exe -s -H $h http://localhost:3000/admin -o "$env:TEMP\\a.html" -w "admin:%{http_code} "; curl.exe -s -H $h http://localhost:3000/admin/products/new -o "$env:TEMP\\b.html" -w "new:%{http_code} "; curl.exe -s -H $h http://localhost:3000/admin/products/crypto-starter-pack -o "$env:TEMP\\c.html" -w "edit:%{http_code}`n"; $a=Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\a.html" -Raw; $b=Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\b.html" -Raw; $c=Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\c.html" -Raw; "admin has Add product: $\($a -match 'Add product'\)"; "new page has form: $\($b -match 'auto-generate'\)"; "edit page prefilled: $\($c -match 'Crypto Starter Pack'\)")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -o "$env:TEMP\\home.html" http://localhost:3000/; $c=Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\home.html" -Raw; foreach\($p in 'wa.me/','Search products','Sort products','Get free hustle tips','Refund Policy','hustle into income'\){ "$p : $\($c -match [regex]::Escape\($p\)\)" })

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ if\(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\){ break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; & "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" --version)

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(150\); $gh=$null; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ foreach\($p in "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ $gh=$p; break } }; if\($gh\){ break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; if\($gh\){ & $gh --version } else { "not installed yet"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ERNIEB~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-Ernie-Blaze-blaze-digital-hub\\08baeea7-64d9-4d2a-9886-9a639909314c\\tasks\\bton69om9.output" -Tail 3 })

PowerShell($deadline=\(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(240\); $gh=$null; while\(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\){ foreach\($p in "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ $gh=$p; break } }; if\($gh\){ break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 }; if\($gh\){ "$gh"; & $gh --version } else { "still not installed"; Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ERNIEB~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-Ernie-Blaze-blaze-digital-hub\\08baeea7-64d9-4d2a-9886-9a639909314c\\tasks\\bton69om9.output" -Tail 5 })

PowerShell($out = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill 2>$null; $creds=@{}; $out | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_ -split '=',2; if\($k\){ $creds[$k]=$v } }; "username: $\($creds['username']\)"; "has token: $\([bool]$creds['password']\)")
